records.quote: Returns six weeks after diagnosis of idiopathic intracranial hypertension (G93.2), confirmed by lumbar puncture on 12/16/2022 with opening pressure of 32 cm H2O.

data.confirming_test: Lumbar puncture 12/16/2022 — opening pressure 32 cm H2O

records.quote: Acetazolamide 500 mg PO BID started 12/16/2022 and has been tolerated aside from mild paresthesias.
Depo-Provera (medroxyprogesterone acetate) was discontinued as of 01/05/2023 given the temporal relationship between injectable contraceptive exposure and symptom onset

Depo-Provera (medroxyprogesterone acetate) was discontinued as of 01/05/2023 given the temporal relationship between injectable contraceptive exposure and symptom onset; treating providers agree the agent is best regarded as a contributing factor and should be discontinued permanently.

data.statement: Depo-Provera (medroxyprogesterone acetate) was discontinued as of 01/05/2023 given the temporal relationship between injectable contraceptive exposure and symptom onset; treating providers agree the agent is best regarded as a contributing factor and should be discontinued permanently.
data.relationship: contributing factor; temporal relationship between exposure and symptom onset
data.author: C. Okafor, MD

records.quote: Denies pulsatile tinnitus. No transient visual obscurations since early January.
Fundus: optic disc edema improving; Frisen grade 1 OU (previously grade 3 OD, grade 2 OS on 11/21/2022). No hemorrhages.

data.result: Optic disc edema improving; Frisen grade 1 OU (previously grade 3 OD, grade 2 OS on 11/21/2022)

records.quote: INTERPRETATION Enlarged blind spot OU, improved from 12/16/2022 baseline (MD -5.4 / -4.6). No new focal defects. Findings consistent with resolving papilledema.

data.result: Enlarged blind spot OU, improved from 12/16/2022 baseline (MD -5.4 / -4.6); no new focal defects; consistent with resolving papilledema

records.quote: OCT RETINAL NERVE FIBER LAYER Average RNFL: OD 128 um (prev 186) OS 119 um (prev 171)

data.intervention: OCT retinal nerve fiber layer analysis
data.result: Average RNFL OD 128 um (prev 186), OS 119 um (prev 171) — optic disc edema resolving bilaterally

records.quote: 2. Papilledema, bilateral (H47.10) · Frisen grade 1 OU, improving.
3. Contraception counseling deferred to gynecology; injectable medroxyprogesterone remains contraindicated in this patient.

data.statement: Contraception counseling deferred to gynecology; injectable medroxyprogesterone remains contraindicated in this patient.
data.author: C. Okafor, MD
